method: Static validation only. The in-app Browser rejected file:// automation via URL policy, and no local server was started per user instruction.
flowUnderTest: current v023 homepage shell rebased with v026 liquid glass -> /AI generated from same shell -> staging and production pointer artifacts updated.
checks: Homepage source is rebased from promoted v023 content, removing the stale contact paragraph and stale arrow CTA copy from the older staging shell.
Contact section uses section-body text-row-list contact-actions, matching the operating-principles section body grammar while keeping contact CTAs.
Impact trigger and employer CTAs share pane-cta typography, min-height, border, fill, and 14px radius.
Homepage keeps nl-refractive-sampler on feed band and product-executive hero.
/AI copy updates the hero line to Install the operating system for business operations and expands the operating-system content.
/AI keeps nl-refractive-sampler on feed band, hero, and Nightly Operating Brief card.
